title: rosa × odorata f. erubescens
intro: Rosa × odorata f. erubescens, also known as the Fragrant Pink Rose or Sweet Briar Rose, is a type of fragrant rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × odorata f. erubescens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other menstrual disorders. Rosa × odorata f. erubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and promote overall well-being.
